headline: How The Amphenol (APH) Story Is Shifting With AI Data Centers And The CommScope Deal
summary: The latest update keeps Amphenol’s modeled fair value steady at US$169.44, with the discount rate nudging from 8.57% to 8.55% and only minor tweaks to long term assumptions. This aligns with recent Street research, where price targets are clustered around the mid US$160s into the US$170s and above, as analysts weigh AI data center exposure against the execution risk on the US$10.5b CommScope deal. Read on to see how to track this evolving narrative and what to watch as the story...

headline: Fed's Capital Reset: Lower Buffers, Increased Lending to Benefit Banks
summary: Fed's plan to cut capital buffers could free up lending and boost growth for banks like JPMorgan, while keeping intact more than $800B in safeguards.
